name: ci

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  rust-target-matrix:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            target: ''
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
          - os: windows-latest
            target: ''
          - os: windows-latest
            target: aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
          - os: macos-14
            target: ''
          - os: macos-14
            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2

      - name: Setup Linux arm64 cross linker
        if: matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu

      - name: Build mdv-cli
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ "${{ matrix.target }}" = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu" ]; then
            export REDACTED
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ matrix.target }}" ]; then
            rustup target add "${{ matrix.target }}"
            cargo build --release -p mdv-cli --target "${{ matrix.target }}"
          else
            cargo build --release -p mdv-cli
          fi

  rust-quality:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2

      - name: Format
        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check

      - name: Lint
        run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings

      - name: Test
        run: cargo test --workspace

      - name: Smoke help
        run: cargo run -p mdv-cli -- --help

      - name: Smoke stream
        run: printf '# smoke\n' | cargo run -p mdv-cli -- --stream --perf >/dev/null

  rust-coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2

      - name: Install cargo-llvm-cov
        run: cargo install cargo-llvm-cov --locked

      - name: Coverage
        run: |
          mkdir -p coverage
          cargo llvm-cov --workspace --no-report
          cargo llvm-cov report --summary-only
          cargo llvm-cov report --fail-under-lines 95 --lcov --output-path coverage/lcov.info

      - name: Upload coverage artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: rust-coverage-lcov
          path: coverage/lcov.info

  package-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install js deps
        run: MDV_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=1 bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Build cli binary
        run: cargo build -p mdv-cli

      - name: CLI js tests
        run: bun run --cwd packages/cli test

      - name: Pack npm package
        run: npm pack ./packages/cli

      - name: Launcher smoke
        run: MDV_BIN=target/debug/mdv-cli node packages/cli/bin/mdv.js --help

  js-coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install deps
        run: MDV_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=1 bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Build cli binary
        run: cargo build -p mdv-cli

      - name: JS coverage
        run: bun run --cwd packages/cli coverage

  perf-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Build release binary
        run: cargo build -p mdv-cli --release

      - name: CLI p95 perf gate (200KB)
        run: node scripts/perf-smoke.mjs

      - name: CLI p95 perf gate (1MB)
        run: |
          MDV_PERF_FIXTURE_BYTES=1048576 \
          MDV_PERF_RUNS=20 \
          MDV_PERF_BUDGET_MS=500 \
          MDV_PERF_SUMMARY=/tmp/mdv-perf-summary-large.txt \
          node scripts/perf-smoke.mjs

      - name: Core render p95 perf gate
        run: cargo test -p mdv-core --release --test perf -- --ignored

      - name: Upload perf summary
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: perf-smoke-summary
          path: |
            /tmp/mdv-perf-summary.txt
            /tmp/mdv-perf-summary-large.txt

--- RELEASE ---
name: release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

env:
  RELEASE_TAG: ${{ github.ref_name }}

concurrency: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref_name }}

jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Validate tag format
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          [[ "${RELEASE_TAG}" =~ ^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$ ]]

      - name: Validate tag matches package version
        id: meta
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          version="$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version")"
          expected="v${version}"
          if [ "${RELEASE_TAG}" != "${expected}" ]; then
            echo "tag/version mismatch: tag=${RELEASE_TAG} pkg=${expected}"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "version=${version}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  create_release:
    needs: validate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Create release (idempotent)
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GH_REPO: Dhruv2mars/mdv
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          gh release view "${RELEASE_TAG}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || gh release create "${RELEASE_TAG}" --title "${RELEASE_TAG}" --generate-notes

  build_upload:
    needs: create_release
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            platform: linux
            arch: x64
            ext: ''
            target: ''
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            platform: linux
            arch: arm64
            ext: ''
            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
          - os: windows-latest
            platform: win32
            arch: x64
            ext: '.exe'
            target: ''
          - os: windows-latest
            platform: win32
            arch: arm64
            ext: '.exe'
            target: aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
          - os: macos-14
            platform: darwin
            arch: arm64
            ext: ''
            target: ''
          - os: macos-14
            platform: darwin
            arch: x64
            ext: ''
            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2

      - name: Setup Linux arm64 cross linker
        if: matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ "${{ matrix.target }}" = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu" ]; then
            export REDACTED
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ matrix.target }}" ]; then
            rustup target add "${{ matrix.target }}"
            cargo build --release -p mdv-cli --target "${{ matrix.target }}"
          else
            cargo build --release -p mdv-cli
          fi

      - name: Package
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist
          bin_dir='target'
          if [ -n "${{ matrix.target }}" ]; then bin_dir="target/${{ matrix.target }}"; fi
          bin="${bin_dir}/release/mdv-cli${{ matrix.ext }}"
          out="dist/mdv-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}${{ matrix.ext }}"
          cp "${bin}" "${out}"

      - name: Checksums
        shell: bash
        run: |
          cd dist
          if command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1; then shasum -a 256 * > checksums-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}.txt; else sha256sum * > checksums-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}.txt; fi

      - name: Upload
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GH_REPO: Dhruv2mars/mdv
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          for f in dist/*; do
            gh release upload --clobber "${RELEASE_TAG}" "$f"
          done

  publish_npm:
    needs:
      - validate
      - build_upload
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 24
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Publish npm (trusted publisher)
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          local_v="$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version")"
          remote_v="$(npm view @dhruv2mars/mdv version 2>/dev/null || true)"
          if [ -n "${remote_v:-}" ] && [ "${remote_v}" = "${local_v}" ]; then
            echo "skip: already on npm (${remote_v})"
            exit 0
          fi
          rc="${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/npmrc"
          echo "registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/" > "$rc"
          export NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG="$rc"
          unset NODE_AUTH_TOKEN || true
          (cd packages/cli && npm publish --provenance --access public)

*** End Patch

payload.message:
Fixed.

I updated the GitHub workflow actions to Node 24-ready versions in [.github/workflows/ci.yml](/Users/dhruv2mars/dev/github/mdv/.github/workflows/ci.yml) and [.github/workflows/release.yml](/Users/dhruv2mars/dev/github/mdv/.github/workflows/release.yml). I also fixed a small release script issue in the checksum step that `actionlint` flagged.

Verified:
- `cd packages/cli && bun run test`
- `actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml`
- PR CI passed cleanly, and the old Node 20 deprecation annotation is gone from that run

Merged PR: https://github.com/Dhruv2mars/mdv/pull/129

I did not trigger a fake release tag just to re-run `release`, but that workflow got the same action upgrades and now lint-checks clean locally.

content.text:
Fixed.

I updated the GitHub workflow actions to Node 24-ready versions in [.github/workflows/ci.yml](/Users/dhruv2mars/dev/github/mdv/.github/workflows/ci.yml) and [.github/workflows/release.yml](/Users/dhruv2mars/dev/github/mdv/.github/workflows/release.yml). I also fixed a small release script issue in the checksum step that `actionlint` flagged.

Verified:
- `cd packages/cli && bun run test`
- `actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml`
- PR CI passed cleanly, and the old Node 20 deprecation annotation is gone from that run

Merged PR: https://github.com/Dhruv2mars/mdv/pull/129

I did not trigger a fake release tag just to re-run `release`, but that workflow got the same action upgrades and now lint-checks clean locally.
